summary: PasseportEtudiant V3 comprehensive testing - Lead Scoring (D1+D2+D3+D4), Badge System, Expanded Schools. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed covering: live score banner, 5 hall tabs, 14 Ingénierie schools, score breakdown with 4 dimensions, 6 badges, 'why' tags on recommendations, lead value display, anonymous empty state.
critical_code_review_comments: Score breakdown correctly implements D1+D2+D3+D4 formula from case study
Gating rule (0 stamps = score 0) properly enforced
Badge unlocking logic works correctly (first, marathon, curieux, premium, explorer, completiste)
Lead value EUR calculation (40-80€ range) works correctly
'Why' tags on recommendations provide good explainability
Anonymous profile (Théo) correctly shows empty state with no breakdown/badges/recos
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 39 schools across 5 halls (i:14, c:8, s:8, a:4, k:5), 8 demo students with pre-seeded stamps and engagement flags
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V3 features working correctly: (1) D1+D2+D3+D4 scoring formula with breakdown, (2) 6 badges with unlock conditions, (3) 39 schools across 5 halls, (4) Live score banner on stamps page, (5) Temperature and lead value on recap, (6) 'Why' tags on recommendations. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_v3_scoring.py cover all new scoring endpoints.

backend_v3_features: GET /api/schools returns 39 schools (14 Ingénierie, 8 Commerce, 8 Sciences Po, 4 Arts, 5 Conférences)
GET /api/halls returns 5 halls with correct labels
score_breakdown contains 4 dimensions (D1, D2, D3, D4) with items, pts, max
badges array contains unlocked badges, all_badges contains 6 badge definitions
recos contain 'why' array with explainability tags
GET /api/analytics/leads returns rows with score_breakdown, temperature, lead_value_eur
frontend_v3_features: Stamps page: live score banner (data-testid='live-score-banner') shows current score
Stamps page: 5 hall tabs (Ingénierie & Numérique, Commerce, Sciences Po · Université, Arts & Design, Conférences)
Stamps page: 14 schools in Ingénierie tab including CentraleSupélec, École 42, Epitech
Recap page: score breakdown card with 4 dimensions (data-testid='score-dim-D1' to D4)
Recap page: D2 has critical styling (red border)
Recap page: items show +X pts in green or 0 in grey
Recap page: unlocked badges have red border + ✓ marker
Recap page: 'Données capturées' shows 'Valeur lead : XX €'
Recap page: recommendations show 'why' tags (+20 pôle déjà visité, +14 filière Ingénierie, etc.)
Recap page (Théo): anonymous empty state - no breakdown, no badges, no recos
